@startuml
participant "Controller" as Controller1 #D3D8FF
participant "<UDP or TCP>Service\nas Service" as UDPorTCP_Service #F9EBB7
participant "Volt.<Udp or Tcp>\nServer" as Volt_UdporTcp_Server #BBE0C5
participant AppSettings #A2DDDF
participant MessageEncryptionChannel #CACAE6

== Initialization ==
activate Controller1 
  -> UDPorTCP_Service : server()  
deactivate Controller1 

group Application Key Retrieval [white]
    activate UDPorTCP_Service   
        note right of UDPorTCP_Service: getApplicationKey()\nis called to retrieve \nan application key from settings.\nThe returned value will be used\nto create an encryption channel.    
      -->AppSettings:getApplicationKey()        
     deactivate AppSettings     
end group  

create participant Encryption Channel <<interface>>#lightgray {      
}    

note over Encrypted_Channel:"The newly created instance implements this interface."   

link between UDP_or_TCP_service_and_encryption_channel_via_route_parameter_using_method_call_syntax_with_arguments_passed_in_parentheses_separated_by_commas_without_spaces_after_them_except_last_one_where_space_is_allowed_before_closing_bracket_if_desired_but_not_required_for_correctness_according_to_standard_conventions_followed_most_widely_across_various_programming_languages_supporting_object_orientated_design_patterns_like_factory_pattern_used_here_indirectly_through_constructor_invocation_inside_body_of_create_operation_performed_on_target_type_named_
